title: karatas neglecta
intro: Karatas neglecta, also known as Pterocarpus marsupium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids in its leaves, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including the potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Karatas neglecta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being made into extracts or capsules for oral consumption or topical application.
